name: Barbell Back Squat
instructions: Set barbell on upper traps in squat rack
Feet shoulder-width apart, toes slightly out
Brace core and take a deep breath
Push hips back and bend knees simultaneously
Descend until hip crease is below knee level
Drive through midfoot to stand

name: Front Squat
instructions: Rest barbell on front delts in rack position
Elbows high, upper arms parallel to floor
Feet shoulder-width apart
Descend keeping torso upright
Drive up through midfoot

name: Goblet Squat
instructions: Hold dumbbell vertically at chest height
Feet slightly wider than shoulder-width
Push hips back and squat down
Keep chest up and elbows inside knees
Stand up driving through heels

name: Bulgarian Split Squat
instructions: Place rear foot on bench behind you
Hold dumbbells at sides
Lower until front thigh is parallel to floor
Keep front knee tracking over toes
Drive up through front heel

name: Leg Press
instructions: Sit in machine with back flat against pad
Place feet shoulder-width on platform
Release safety handles
Lower platform by bending knees to 90 degrees
Press through feet to extend legs

name: Barbell Bench Press
instructions: Lie on bench with eyes under barbell
Grip bar slightly wider than shoulder-width
Retract shoulder blades and arch upper back slightly
Unrack bar and lower to mid-chest
Press up and slightly back to lockout

name: Incline Dumbbell Press
instructions: Set bench to 30-45 degree incline
Sit back with dumbbells at shoulder level
Press dumbbells up and together
Lower with control to chest level
Keep feet flat on floor

name: Dumbbell Flat Press
instructions: Lie flat on bench with dumbbells at chest
Press dumbbells up to full extension
Lower dumbbells with control to chest level
Keep neutral wrist position

name: Push-Up
instructions: Hands shoulder-width apart on floor
Body in straight line from head to heels
Lower chest to just above floor
Push back up to full arm extension
Keep core braced throughout

name: Dip
instructions: Grip parallel bars and lift body
Lean slightly forward for chest emphasis
Lower until upper arms parallel to floor
Press back up to full lockout

name: Overhead Press
instructions: Grip bar at shoulder width in front rack
Brace core and squeeze glutes
Press bar straight overhead
Push head through once bar clears
Lock out with bar over midfoot

name: Dumbbell Shoulder Press
instructions: Sit or stand with dumbbells at shoulder height
Palms facing forward
Press dumbbells overhead until arms are straight
Lower with control back to shoulders

name: Landmine Press
instructions: Place one end of barbell in landmine or corner
Hold other end at shoulder height
Press up and forward following the arc
Lower with control

name: Conventional Deadlift
instructions: Stand with feet hip-width, bar over midfoot
Grip bar just outside knees
Set back flat, chest up, hips back
Push floor away to initiate lift
Lock out hips and knees simultaneously
Lower by hinging at hips first

name: Romanian Deadlift
instructions: Hold barbell at hip height with overhand grip
Push hips back while keeping slight knee bend
Lower bar along legs until hamstring stretch
Maintain flat back throughout
Drive hips forward to return to top

name: Trap Bar Deadlift
instructions: Step inside trap bar, feet hip-width
Grip handles at sides
Set back flat, chest up
Drive through feet to stand
Lock out hips at top

name: Barbell Hip Thrust
instructions: Sit on floor with upper back against bench
Roll barbell over hips with pad
Feet flat, hip-width apart
Drive hips up by squeezing glutes
Pause at top with hips fully extended
Lower with control

name: Good Morning
instructions: Place barbell on upper back as for squat
Feet shoulder-width apart
Push hips back with slight knee bend
Lower torso until nearly parallel to floor
Drive hips forward to return

name: Barbell Row
instructions: Hinge forward with flat back, bar hanging below
Grip bar slightly wider than shoulder-width
Pull bar to lower chest/upper abdomen
Squeeze shoulder blades together at top
Lower with control

name: Dumbbell Row
instructions: Place one hand and knee on bench
Hold dumbbell in free hand, arm extended
Pull dumbbell to hip, elbow close to body
Squeeze back at top
Lower with control

name: Seated Cable Row
instructions: Sit at cable row with feet on platform
Grip handle with arms extended
Pull handle to lower chest
Squeeze shoulder blades together
Return with control to start

name: Pull-Up
instructions: Grip bar with overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulders
Hang with arms fully extended
Pull body up until chin clears bar
Lower with control to full hang

name: Chin-Up
instructions: Grip bar with underhand grip, shoulder-width
Hang with arms fully extended
Pull body up until chin clears bar
Lower with control

name: Lat Pulldown
instructions: Sit at lat pulldown with thighs under pad
Grip bar wide with overhand grip
Pull bar to upper chest
Squeeze lats at bottom
Return with control

name: Walking Lunge
instructions: Hold dumbbells at sides
Step forward into lunge position
Lower back knee toward floor
Push through front foot to step forward
Alternate legs with each step

name: Reverse Lunge
instructions: Stand with dumbbells at sides
Step one foot backward
Lower back knee toward floor
Push through front heel to return to standing
Alternate legs

name: Step-Up
instructions: Stand facing a bench or box
Hold dumbbells at sides
Place one foot fully on the box
Drive through the top foot to stand up
Lower back down with control

name: Farmer's Walk
instructions: Pick up heavy dumbbells at sides
Stand tall with shoulders back
Walk with short controlled steps
Keep core braced and shoulders level
Maintain upright posture throughout

name: Suitcase Carry
instructions: Hold a heavy dumbbell in one hand at your side
Stand tall, resist leaning to loaded side
Walk with controlled steps
Keep hips and shoulders level
Switch hands halfway

name: Cable Woodchop
instructions: Set cable to high position
Stand sideways to machine
Grip handle with both hands
Rotate torso pulling cable down and across
Control the return

name: Pallof Press
instructions: Stand perpendicular to cable machine
Hold handle at chest with both hands
Press hands straight out in front of chest
Hold extended position resisting rotation
Return hands to chest

name: Sumo Deadlift
instructions: Take wide stance with toes pointed out
Grip bar inside knees
Chest up, back flat, hips low
Push floor apart with feet to initiate lift
Lock out hips at top

name: Hack Squat
instructions: Position shoulders under pads in hack squat machine
Feet shoulder-width on platform
Release safety and lower under control
Descend to full depth
Push through feet to return

name: Pendlay Row
instructions: Bend over until torso is parallel to floor
Grip barbell on floor, shoulder-width
Explosively row bar to lower chest
Return bar to floor each rep
Reset position between reps

name: T-Bar Row
instructions: Straddle barbell in landmine
Use V-handle grip
Hinge forward with flat back
Pull handle to chest
Squeeze at top and lower with control

name: Inverted Row
instructions: Set bar at waist height in rack
Hang underneath with overhand grip
Body straight from head to heels
Pull chest to bar
Lower with control

name: Close-Grip Bench Press
instructions: Lie on bench, grip bar shoulder-width or narrower
Retract shoulder blades
Lower bar to lower chest with elbows tucked
Press up to lockout
commonMistakes: Grip too narrow causing wrist pain

name: Chest Supported Row
instructions: Set bench to 30-45 degree incline
Lie face down with dumbbells hanging
Row both dumbbells up to ribcage
Squeeze shoulder blades at top
Lower with control

name: Barbell Curl
instructions: Stand with barbell, underhand grip shoulder-width
Keep elbows pinned at sides
Curl bar up to shoulder height
Lower with control to full extension

name: Dumbbell Curl
instructions: Stand or sit with dumbbells at sides
Curl one or both dumbbells upward
Rotate palms up during curl (supinate)
Squeeze biceps at top
Lower with control

name: Hammer Curl
instructions: Stand with dumbbells at sides, palms facing body
Curl dumbbells up keeping neutral grip
Squeeze at top
Lower with control

name: Preacher Curl
instructions: Sit at preacher bench with arms over pad
Grip EZ bar with underhand grip
Curl bar up toward shoulders
Lower with control, stopping before full extension

name: Incline Dumbbell Curl
instructions: Set bench to 45-60 degree incline
Sit back with dumbbells hanging at sides
Curl dumbbells up with arms behind torso
Squeeze at top and lower with control

name: Tricep Pushdown
instructions: Stand at cable machine with rope or bar attachment
Keep elbows pinned at sides
Push attachment down to full extension
Squeeze triceps at bottom
Return with control

name: Overhead Tricep Extension
instructions: Hold dumbbell with both hands overhead
Lower behind head by bending elbows
Keep upper arms stationary beside ears
Extend arms to return to start

name: Skull Crusher
instructions: Lie on bench holding EZ bar with narrow grip
Arms extended above chest
Lower bar toward forehead by bending elbows
Keep upper arms vertical
Extend back to start

name: Tricep Kickback
instructions: Hinge forward supporting on bench with one hand
Hold dumbbell with upper arm parallel to torso
Extend forearm back until arm is straight
Squeeze at full extension
Lower with control

name: Lateral Raise
instructions: Stand with dumbbells at sides
Raise arms out to sides until parallel to floor
Lead with elbows, slight bend in arms
Lower with control

name: Front Raise
instructions: Stand with dumbbells in front of thighs
Raise one or both dumbbells forward to eye level
Keep slight bend in elbows
Lower with control

name: Face Pull
instructions: Set cable at upper chest height with rope
Pull rope toward face separating ends
External rotate shoulders at end
Squeeze rear delts and upper back
Return with control
commonMistakes: Pulling to chest instead of face

name: Reverse Fly
instructions: Hinge forward at hips or lie face down on bench
Hold dumbbells hanging below with slight elbow bend
Raise arms out to sides squeezing rear delts
Lower with control

name: Dumbbell Shrug
instructions: Stand with dumbbells at sides
Shrug shoulders straight up toward ears
Hold at top for a second
Lower with control

name: Leg Extension
instructions: Sit in leg extension machine with back against pad
Hook ankles under roller pad
Extend legs to full lockout
Squeeze quads at top
Lower with control

name: Leg Curl
instructions: Lie face down on leg curl machine
Hook heels under pad
Curl legs up toward glutes
Squeeze hamstrings at top
Lower with control

name: Standing Calf Raise
instructions: Stand on calf raise machine with balls of feet on platform
Lower heels below platform for full stretch
Rise up on toes as high as possible
Squeeze calves at top
Lower with control

name: Seated Calf Raise
instructions: Sit at seated calf raise machine
Place knees under pad, balls of feet on platform
Lower heels for full stretch
Rise up on toes and squeeze
Lower with control

name: Cable Fly
instructions: Set cables at chest height
Stand centered between pulleys
With slight elbow bend, bring handles together in front
Squeeze chest at center
Return with control

name: Dumbbell Fly
instructions: Lie on flat bench with dumbbells above chest
Lower dumbbells out to sides in arc motion
Maintain slight bend in elbows
Bring dumbbells back together above chest

name: Cable Lateral Raise
instructions: Stand sideways to low cable
Hold handle in far hand across body
Raise arm out to side until parallel to floor
Lower with control

name: Wrist Curl
instructions: Sit with forearms on thighs, palms up
Hold dumbbells and lower wrists down
Curl wrists up as high as possible
Lower with control

name: Hip Adduction
instructions: Sit in adduction machine with legs spread
Squeeze legs together against pads
Hold at center briefly
Return with control to start

name: Hip Abduction
instructions: Sit in abduction machine with legs together
Push legs apart against pads
Hold at end position briefly
Return with control

name: Plank
instructions: Get into push-up position on forearms
Body straight from head to heels
Brace core and squeeze glutes
Hold position for prescribed time

name: Hanging Leg Raise
instructions: Hang from pull-up bar with straight arms
Raise legs until parallel to floor or higher
Control the descent back to hang
Avoid swinging

name: Ab Wheel Rollout
instructions: Kneel on mat with ab wheel in front
Roll wheel forward extending body
Go as far as you can maintain form
Pull wheel back using core strength

name: Cable Crunch
instructions: Kneel facing cable machine with rope behind head
Crunch down bringing elbows toward knees
Squeeze abs at bottom
Return with control

name: Russian Twist
instructions: Sit with knees bent and feet slightly off floor
Lean back slightly, core engaged
Rotate torso side to side
Touch weight to floor each side

name: Concentration Curl
instructions: Sit on bench with elbow braced against inner thigh
Hold dumbbell with arm fully extended
Curl dumbbell up to shoulder
Squeeze at top and lower slowly

name: Cable Bicep Curl
instructions: Stand facing low cable with bar or rope
Curl handle up keeping elbows at sides
Squeeze biceps at top
Lower with control

name: Machine Chest Press
instructions: Adjust seat height so handles are at chest level
Grip handles and press forward
Extend arms without locking elbows
Return with control

name: Machine Shoulder Press
instructions: Adjust seat so handles are at shoulder level
Grip handles and press overhead
Extend arms without locking elbows
Lower with control

name: Cable Tricep Overhead Extension
instructions: Face away from low cable holding rope behind head
Extend arms forward and upward
Squeeze triceps at full extension
Return with control behind head

name: Nordic Hamstring Curl
instructions: Kneel with ankles secured under pad or by partner
Keep body straight from knees to head
Lower torso forward as slowly as possible
Use hamstrings to control descent
Push up from floor if needed to return

name: Barbell Hip Abduction
instructions: Place band around knees or ankles
Stand or sit with feet together
Push knees or feet apart against band resistance
Hold at end range
Return with control

name: Running
instructions: Start with a 5-minute walking warmup
Maintain upright posture with slight forward lean
Land on midfoot under your center of mass
Breathe rhythmically matching your cadence
Cool down with 5-minute walk

name: Cycling
instructions: Adjust seat height so leg slightly bent at bottom
Start pedaling at moderate cadence
Maintain even pedal pressure throughout stroke
Keep upper body relaxed

name: Rowing Machine
instructions: Sit on rower and strap feet in
Grab handle with overhand grip
Push with legs first, then lean back, then pull arms
Reverse order to return: arms, body, legs
Maintain smooth consistent rhythm

name: Jump Rope
instructions: Hold rope handles at hip height
Rotate rope with wrists, not arms
Jump just high enough to clear rope
Land softly on balls of feet
Keep core engaged

name: Stair Climber
instructions: Step onto machine and select speed
Stand upright, lightly grip rails for balance
Step with full foot on each stair
Maintain consistent pace

name: Elliptical
instructions: Step onto pedals and grip handles
Begin striding with smooth oval motion
Push and pull handles with arms
Maintain upright posture

name: Battle Ropes
instructions: Stand with feet shoulder-width holding rope ends
Alternately raise and lower arms creating waves
Keep core braced and knees slightly bent
Maintain consistent wave amplitude

name: Burpee
instructions: Stand with feet shoulder-width
Squat down and place hands on floor
Jump feet back to push-up position
Perform a push-up
Jump feet forward to squat
Jump up with arms overhead

name: Kettlebell Swing
instructions: Stand with kettlebell between feet
Hinge at hips gripping with both hands
Hike kettlebell back between legs
Snap hips forward driving bell to chest height
Let gravity swing bell back and repeat

name: Box Jump
instructions: Stand facing a sturdy box or platform
Swing arms and bend knees to load
Explosively jump onto box
Land softly with full feet on box
Stand fully, then step down

name: Sprinting
instructions: Warm up thoroughly with jogging and dynamic stretches
Drive knees high and pump arms
Stay on balls of feet
Sprint at maximum effort for prescribed distance or time
Decelerate gradually

name: Mountain Climber
instructions: Start in push-up position
Drive one knee toward chest
Quickly switch legs in running motion
Keep hips level and core engaged
Maintain steady pace

name: Swimming
instructions: Warm up with easy laps
Maintain streamlined body position
Breathe rhythmically matching stroke
Use full arm pulls and leg kicks
Cool down with easy backstroke

name: Standing Hamstring Stretch
instructions: Stand with feet hip-width apart
Hinge at hips reaching toward toes
Keep knees slightly bent
Hold stretch for 30-60 seconds
Breathe deeply and relax into stretch

name: Hip Flexor Stretch
instructions: Kneel on one knee with other foot flat in front
Push hips forward gently
Keep torso upright
Hold for 30-60 seconds
Switch sides

name: Pigeon Stretch
instructions: Start in tabletop position
Bring one knee forward behind wrist
Extend back leg straight behind
Lower hips toward floor
Hold for 30-60 seconds per side

name: Shoulder Dislocate
instructions: Hold band or stick with wide grip in front
Keep arms straight throughout
Slowly raise overhead and behind back
Return to front with control
Narrow grip as mobility improves

name: Cat-Cow Stretch
instructions: Start on hands and knees in tabletop
Inhale: drop belly, lift chest and tailbone (cow)
Exhale: round spine, tuck chin and pelvis (cat)
Flow between positions with breath
Repeat for 10-15 cycles

name: Quad Stretch
instructions: Stand on one leg, use wall for balance if needed
Grab ankle of free leg behind you
Pull heel toward glute
Keep knees together and hips forward
Hold 30-60 seconds per side

name: Chest Doorway Stretch
instructions: Stand in doorway with arms on frame at 90 degrees
Step forward through doorway
Feel stretch across chest and front shoulders
Hold 30-60 seconds

name: World's Greatest Stretch
instructions: Step into deep lunge position
Place inside hand on floor beside front foot
Rotate torso and reach outside arm to ceiling
Hold and breathe
Return and switch sides

name: Foam Rolling - IT Band
instructions: Lie on side with foam roller under outer thigh
Support weight with bottom arm
Roll slowly from hip to just above knee
Pause on tender spots for 20-30 seconds
Roll for 60-90 seconds per side

name: EZ Bar Curl
instructions: Stand with EZ bar using the angled grip
Keep elbows at sides
Curl bar to shoulder height
Lower with control

name: Pec Deck Fly
instructions: Sit in machine with back against pad
Place forearms against pads or grip handles
Bring arms together in front of chest
Squeeze chest at center
Return with control

name: Machine Lat Pullover
instructions: Sit in pullover machine with back against pad
Grip bar overhead with arms extended
Pull bar down in arc to hip level
Squeeze lats at bottom
Return with control overhead

name: Reverse Grip Tricep Pushdown
instructions: Stand at cable with short bar underhand grip
Keep elbows at sides
Push bar down to full extension
Squeeze triceps at bottom
Return with control

name: Single Leg Romanian Deadlift
instructions: Stand on one leg holding dumbbell in opposite hand
Hinge forward at hip extending free leg behind
Lower dumbbell toward floor
Keep hips square
Return to standing using hamstring and glute

name: Seated Row Machine
instructions: Sit at machine with chest against pad
Grip handles at arm's length
Pull handles back squeezing shoulder blades
Hold briefly at contraction
Return with control

name: Decline Sit-Up
instructions: Hook feet under pad on decline bench
Cross arms over chest or behind head
Lower back toward bench with control
Curl torso up squeezing abs
Lower with control

name: Reverse Hyperextension
instructions: Lie face down on high bench with hips at edge
Hold bench sides for stability
Raise legs behind you by squeezing glutes
Lift until legs are parallel to floor
Lower with control

name: Cable Pull-Through
instructions: Face away from low cable with rope between legs
Hinge at hips pushing them back
Arms extend between legs
Drive hips forward squeezing glutes
Stand tall at top
